description_long: This helmet features a dramatic, fantasy-inspired design with a glossy, deep purple shell and prominent black horns extending upward and outward from the sides. The front is adorned with three gold, oval-shaped eye-like elements, giving it an intimidating, almost insectoid or demonic appearance. The lower front section has angular, pointed extensions resembling fangs or mandibles, enhancing its menacing look. The helmet's surface is smooth and highly reflective, suggesting a hard, durable material such as painted metal or high-gloss plastic. The back is rounded and seamless, with the horns curving backward and upward. There are no visible ventilation openings, visors, or retention systems, and the interior is likely hollow to accommodate a human head.
description: A glossy, deep purple helmet with large black horns, gold eye-like accents, and angular, fang-like front extensions, evoking a fantasy or demonic style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the three gold eye-like accents, large black horns, and angular, fang-like lower extensions.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the length and curvature of the horn, as well as the helmet's smooth, rounded back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the seamless, glossy purple shell and the symmetrical backward curve of the horns.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the horn's profile and the angular front extensions.
